author: IvoAC1975
title: App updates the wrong MP3 on my OneDrive
content:
When I update an MP3 on my Onedrive, it actually updates the wrong file or it does not update it at all.

I tried several time closing the app, re-opening or re-loading the data, but kept having the same problem. Please refund.

author: beijder
title: Can’t manage Apple Music library files on iPhone
content: When you store all your “own” MP3 files in the Apple Music Library these are NOT accessible via this app.

author: Alex Hiemstra
title: Great app! + suggestion
content: Nice app, but i have a suggestion, add a music player in the app! That would be great! Thank you in advance

author: Pannekoekje
title: Doesn’t connect to NAS
content: My music library is located on my NAS. This app doesn’t seem to find it, however Flacbox does.

author: Bert_RPV
title: Counterintuitive
content: I really want to like the app. I need something like this. Unfortunately it is totally counterintuitive. I can't get anything done. E.g. Want to add an album cover? Get it via 'internet' ....save it...want to use? Can't find it anywhere! It's the same as with Evermusic (purchased it). Great sound, but unworkable. Running into a brick wall everytime. Read the manual? Equally totally confusing. I give up. The search continues.
